title: Mercia's new set of wheels
description: GEORGE NEWS - An article George Herald...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - An article George Herald published in mid-January shared Mercia Roberts' story and her urgent need for an electrically powered wheelchair after her own had broken down.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - An article George Herald published in mid-January shared Mercia Roberts' story and her urgent need for an electrically powered wheelchair after her own had broken down."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The response that followed was overwhelming."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the help of one very special woman who brought and donated a wheelchair, as well as with some funds raised from the community, Roberts' family could help her in a time when she felt vulnerable, isolated and unsure of what the future held.","html":"With the help of one very special woman who brought and donated a wheelchair, as well as with some funds raised from the community, Roberts' family could help her in a time when she felt vulnerable, isolated and unsure of what the future held."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We extend our deepest gratitude to everyone who opened their hearts to help Mercia receive a new electrical wheelchair,\" says Zelna Fourie, her sister.","html":"\"We extend our deepest gratitude to everyone who opened their hearts to help Mercia receive a new electrical wheelchair,\" says Zelna Fourie, her sister."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Roberts has lived with paralysis since childhood and, due to severe deformities to her hands, relies entirely on an electrical wheelchair for mobility and independence.","html":"Roberts has lived with paralysis since childhood and, due to severe deformities to her hands, relies entirely on an electrical wheelchair for mobility and independence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When her chair stopped working, she was left almost completely immobile. This was a devastating setback during an already incredibly difficult period marked by the recent loss of her husband and the diagnosis of breast and liver cancer.","html":"When her chair stopped working, she was left almost completely immobile. This was a devastating setback during an already incredibly difficult period marked by the recent loss of her husband and the diagnosis of breast and liver cancer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read an earlier article here:","html":"Read an earlier article here:"},{"type":"list","items":["Family seeks help to restore woman's mobility"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
